title: Real-time Live Updates with WebSockets
statement: Implement a WebSocket API using Express that allows clients to receive real-time updates on scores of a fictional sports league. The API should support creating and joining a room (channel) for a specific team, broadcasting updates to all connected clients in that room, and handling disconnections and reconnections.
constraints: Use the in-memory array provided for storing team scores.
Implement room creation and joining via WebSocket upgrade.

endpoints.description: Returns a list of all available teams and their current scores.
Creates a new team and assigns it an initial score of 0. The client must send the team name in the request body.
Returns the score for a specific team.
